intent.goal: Analyze driver-provided order and refund policy files, build missing MCP services as needed, and produce a refund risk report.
intent.business_context: The driver owns the user files. Master and slave agents may run on other machines, so they must use manifest URLs instead of local file paths.
success_criteria: The first phase can build the CSV profiling and refund policy checking MCP services concurrently.
The final report references the driver-provided orders.csv and refund-policy.md inputs.
Generated MCP code is persisted as observer artifacts and hidden from the user unless requested.

recovery_hint: Re-run is idempotent; outputs land under refund-risk-report.md. Inspect that artifact before retry — it is the only authoritative output.
